name: THE NOTHING BEAST

abilities.name: Demise (Stolen Moments)
abilities.text: When this model is killed, enemy models within (r)2" of this model must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Slow token.

abilities.name: Half in the Void
abilities.text: If this model has a Flicker token, reduce damage this model deals by 1.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

actions.name: Obliterate
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 1" of an Echo marker, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

actions.name: Accelerate Time
actions.effects: Allies within range may place within 3" of their current locations.

actions.name: Stutter Time
actions.effects: Target gains a Backtrack token. If this action receives a raise, place the target anywhere within 2" of its current location.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Blurred Motion
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Concealment) token.

extraction_notes: Incorporeal has unusual defense icon (Ψ) before ability name
